children.name:
System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.WebDriverTimeoutException : Timed out after 30 seconds
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.NoSuchElementException : no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":"[class='clockicon']"}
  (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.45); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception
Видимость материала во время проведения активности

System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.WebDriverTimeoutException : Timed out after 30 seconds
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.NoSuchElementException : no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":".date [type='text']"}
  (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.45); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception
Успешное сохранение, если обе даты корректно заполнены

System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.WebDriverTimeoutException : Timed out after 30 seconds
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.NoSuchElementException : no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//div[contains(@class,'knowledge-label-chip-avatar')]"}
  (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.45); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception

System.Reflection.TargetInvocationException : Exception has been thrown by the target of an invocation.
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.WebDriverTimeoutException : Timed out after 30 seconds
  ----> OpenQA.Selenium.NoSuchElementException : no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//input[contains(@aria-label,'Максимальный балл')]"}
  (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.45); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception
Проверка установки Максимального порога баллов в активности Кода будущего
Можно добавить материал типа Тест-тренажёр из Библиотеки в шаблон контрольной
